---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Problem

What problem does this solve?

Describe the scenario where Tabulo is currently insufficient.
Be specific and include examples if possible.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added?

Describe the expected behavior or API.
Keep it simple and focused.

## Example

If possible, provide a small code or CSV example showing the desired behavior.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered other approaches or workarounds?
Explain briefly.

## Additional context

Any extra context, constraints, or performance considerations.

> ⚠️ Tabulo is focused on high-performance CSV parsing.
> Feature requests that add heavy abstractions or deviate from this goal may not be accepted.
